subject: add(value)
evidence: ArrayList methods add(value) appends value at end of list

subject: add(index, value)
evidence: ArrayList methods add(index, value) inserts given value just before the given index, shifting subsequent values to the right

subject: clear()
evidence: ArrayList methods clear() removes all elements of the list

subject: indexof(value)
evidence: ArrayList methods indexOf(value) returns first index where given value is found in list (-1 if not found)

subject: remove(index)
evidence: ArrayList methods remove(index) removes/returns value at given index, shifting subsequent values to the left

subject: set(index, value)
evidence: ArrayList methods set(index, value) replaces value at given index with given value

subject: size()
evidence: ArrayList methods size() returns the number of elements in list

subject: tostring()
evidence: ArrayList methods toString() returns a string representation of the list such as "[3, 42, -7, 15]"

subject: addall
evidence:
addAll(list)
addAll(index, list) adds all elements from the given list to this list (at the end of the list, or inserts them at the given index)

subject: remove
evidence: remove(value) finds and removes the given value from this list

subject: removeall
evidence: removeAll(list) removes any elements found in the given list from this list

subject: retainall
evidence:
retainAll(list) removes any elements not
found in given list from this list
